## Dispatch & Communication

| Tool | Purpose | CLI Usage |
|------|---------|-----------|
| `skynet_dispatch.py` | Primary worker dispatch pipeline (ghost-type delivery) | `python tools/skynet_dispatch.py --worker NAME --task "task"` |
| `skynet_brain_dispatch.py` | Intelligent auto-dispatch with planning + wait + synthesis | `python tools/skynet_brain_dispatch.py "goal" [--plan-only] [--dry-run]` |
| `skynet_delivery.py` | Low-level delivery pipeline (consultant + worker) | Internal API |
| `skynet_prompt_assembly.py` | Builds dispatch preamble with identity + rules | Internal API |
| `skynet_dispatch_resilience.py` | Retry logic and fallback for failed dispatches | Internal API |
| `skynet_dispatch_verify.py` | Post-dispatch verification via UIA polling | Internal API |
| `skynet_spam_guard.py` | Anti-spam guard — all bus publishes MUST use `guarded_publish()` | `from tools.skynet_spam_guard import guarded_publish` |
| `skynet_bus_validator.py` | Validates bus message schema before publishing | Internal API |
| `skynet_message_order.py` | Message ordering and sequencing | Internal API |
| `skynet_vector_clock.py` | Vector clock for causal message ordering | Internal API |
| `bus_poller.py` | Simple bus message poller | `python tools/bus_poller.py --limit 20` |
| `orch_realtime.py` | Real-time orchestrator operations (status, wait, dispatch-wait) | `python tools/orch_realtime.py status\|pending\|wait\|dispatch-wait` |

## Monitoring & Health

| Tool | Purpose | CLI Usage |
|------|---------|-----------|
| `skynet_quick_status.py` | **One-command unified status** (workers, daemons, bus, IQ, TODOs) | `python tools/skynet_quick_status.py [--json]` |
| `skynet_monitor.py` | Worker HWND liveness + model drift detection daemon | `python tools/skynet_monitor.py` (daemon) |
| `skynet_watchdog.py` | Backend/GOD Console process liveness watchdog | `python tools/skynet_watchdog.py` (daemon) |
| `skynet_health.py` | Health check utilities | Internal API |
| `skynet_health_report.py` | Periodic health report generation | `python tools/skynet_health_report.py` |
| `skynet_daemon_health.py` | Daemon health monitoring | `python tools/skynet_daemon_health.py` |
| `skynet_daemon_health_dashboard.py` | Dashboard for daemon health visualization | Internal API |
| `skynet_daemon_status.py` | Daemon status management (start/stop/restart) | `python tools/skynet_daemon_status.py [status\|start\|stop] [name]` |
| `skynet_cleanliness_audit.py` | Workspace cleanliness auditor (stale PIDs, orphans) | `python tools/skynet_cleanliness_audit.py [--fix] [--quiet]` |
| `skynet_stuck_detector.py` | Detects stuck workers (PROCESSING > threshold) | Internal API |
| `skynet_observability.py` | Observability and tracing | Internal API |
| `skynet_agent_telemetry.py` | Agent telemetry collection | Internal API |
| `daemon_health.py` | Lightweight daemon health probe | Internal API |
| `engine_metrics.py` | Intelligence engine metrics (online/available/offline) | `from tools.engine_metrics import collect_engine_metrics` |

## Worker Management

| Tool | Purpose | CLI Usage |
|------|---------|-----------|
| `skynet_worker_boot.py` | **Canonical worker window opener** (Rule #0.06) | `python tools/skynet_worker_boot.py --all --orch-hwnd HWND` |
| `skynet_boot_guard.py` | Boot integrity guard (hash verification) | `python tools/skynet_boot_guard.py [--update-hash]` |
| `skynet_start.py` | Legacy worker start (DEPRECATED — use worker_boot) | `python tools/skynet_start.py` |
| `skynet_invocation.py` | Full-power worker self-invocation system | `python tools/skynet_invocation.py --worker NAME` |
| `skynet_worker_poll.py` | Autonomous worker task polling | `python tools/skynet_worker_poll.py WORKER_NAME` |
| `skynet_worker_loop.py` | Worker polling loop daemon | `python tools/skynet_worker_loop.py` (daemon) |
| `skynet_worker_check.py` | Worker state verification | Internal API |
| `skynet_worker_toolkit.py` | Worker helper utilities | Internal API |
| `skynet_worker_autonomy.py` | Autonomous worker behavior | Internal API |
| `skynet_autonomous_worker.py` | Extended autonomous worker logic | Internal API |
| `skynet_windows.py` | Window management utilities | Internal API |
| `set_copilot_cli.py` | Set VS Code session target to Copilot CLI | `python tools/set_copilot_cli.py` |
| `set_autopilot.py` | Set VS Code permissions to Autopilot | `python tools/set_autopilot.py` |
| `skynet_model_guard.py` | Model drift detection and correction | Internal API |
| `boot_cleanup.py` | Post-boot cleanup tasks | Internal API |
| `boot_preflight.py` | Pre-boot preflight checks | Internal API |
| `verify_boot_state.py` | Boot state verification | `python tools/verify_boot_state.py` |
| `uia_engine.py` | COM-based UI Automation engine (7x faster than PowerShell) | `from tools.uia_engine import get_engine` |
| `ghost_mouse.py` | Focus-free mouse operations via PostMessage/UIA | `from tools.ghost_mouse import ghost_click` |

## Daemons

All daemons use PID files under `data/` for singleton enforcement.

| Daemon | Script | PID File | Criticality | Purpose |
|--------|--------|----------|-------------|---------|
| Monitor | `skynet_monitor.py` | `monitor.pid` | CRITICAL | Worker HWND liveness + model drift |
| Watchdog | `skynet_watchdog.py` | `watchdog.pid` | CRITICAL | Backend/GOD Console liveness |
| Realtime | `skynet_realtime.py` | `realtime.pid` | CRITICAL | SSE → `data/realtime.json` |
| Self-Prompt | `skynet_self_prompt.py` | `self_prompt.pid` | DISABLED | Orchestrator heartbeat (disabled per INCIDENT 016) |
| Self-Improve | `skynet_self_improve.py` | `self_improve.pid` | HIGH | Self-improvement engine |
| Bus Relay | `skynet_bus_relay.py` | `bus_relay.pid` | HIGH | Bus message relay |
| Learner | `skynet_learner.py` | `learner.pid` | HIGH | Knowledge learning engine |
| Overseer | `skynet_overseer.py` | `overseer.pid` | HIGH | Idle worker + pending TODO alerts |
| SSE Daemon | `skynet_sse_daemon.py` | `sse_daemon.pid` | MEDIUM | Dashboard SSE streaming |
| Bus Watcher | `skynet_bus_watcher.py` | `bus_watcher.pid` | MEDIUM | Auto-route pending tasks |
| Bus Persist | `skynet_bus_persist.py` | `bus_persist.pid` | MEDIUM | JSONL bus archival |
| Idle Monitor | `skynet_idle_monitor.py` | `idle_monitor.pid` | MEDIUM | Extended idle detection |
| Consultant Consumer | `skynet_consultant_consumer.py` | `consultant_consumer_*.pid` | MEDIUM | Drain consultant bridge queue |
| Worker Loop | `skynet_worker_loop.py` | `worker_loop.pid` | LOW | Worker polling loop |
